clusters.title: Shared chrome
clusters.summary: Shared window chrome: theme and Palette, tab strip, sidebar primitives, widgets, panel registry, and command reference used identically by File Atlas and Slate.

clusters.title: Document model & artifact
clusters.summary: Slate workbook document model with faceted tags and the board scene graph, plus the HTML artifact writer that serializes scenes to slides with embedded CSS and JS.

clusters.title: Geometry
clusters.summary: Pure geometry utilities: circle packing and Venn layout, plus a Rust reader for cached render meshes in Rhino .3dm files used by Slate board viewports.

clusters.title: Core index & scanning
clusters.summary: UI-free backend for types, folder scanning, SQLite index, thumbnail pool and cache tiers, tree layout, journal, export, and filesystem watching.

clusters.title: AI link
clusters.summary: Cursor integration: shared AI workspace config, launcher, live-link context beacon, and the sidebar AI panel body rendered identically in both apps.

clusters.title: Session bridge
clusters.summary: In-process bridge for linked Slate and Atlas sessions: tag groups, assignment queues, and cross-window drag payloads.

clusters.title: Atlas app
clusters.summary: File Atlas application: folder scanning, tree canvas, destination assignment, and export workflow built on shared Atlas crates.

clusters.title: Slate app
clusters.summary: Slate application: tag-driven workbooks, grid and Venn views, board authoring, Lens canvas, tagging sidebar, and linked-session host.
